scope: M1.3-1 regression sample freeze and attribution relabeling only
source_files: 落地设计文档/10-M1.3回归修复版分步骤文档.md

privacy.note: This artifact uses query ids, case ids, metrics, ranks, labels, and technical attribution summaries only.

cross_relation_summary: after_vs_baseline REGRESSED is identical to final bad case METRIC_REGRESSION: 9/9 same query ids.
before_after REGRESSED has 4 query ids; 3 also appear in after_vs_baseline REGRESSED and METRIC_REGRESSION, while product_q007 is before_after-only and still above baseline.

final RECALL_MISS has 11 query ids and is disjoint from both REGRESSED sets and METRIC_REGRESSION; these are Top10-miss blockers but not labeled metric regression because baseline/current metrics are all zero.
product_q008 is a Top10-hit-lost metric regression against baseline, but it is not labeled RECALL_MISS in final bad cases.

triage_items.evidence_summary: BM25 has relevant candidates outside Top10, but merged current pool still has no relevant Top10 hit; M1.2 recall report records BM25-hit-but-not-merged gating.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-3 only: inspect controlled BM25/admission merge for listed ids; do not globally expand all candidate pools.

triage_items.evidence_summary: Relevant targets are absent across original vector, rewrite vector, cleaned BM25, and expanded BM25 in M1.2 recall repair; source labels it unresolved recall/data mismatch candidate.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: Evidence-first only: verify qrels/corpus alignment and per-stage target presence before any recall code change.

missing: Need evidence distinguishing true recall-pool absence from qrels/data mismatch.
Need per-stage target presence and corpus/qrels alignment proof before code repair.

triage_items.evidence_summary: Relevant target is recovered by vector below Top10; final current Top10 still has no relevant hit.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-3/M1.3-4 only for listed ids: inspect candidate presence and ranking suppression; no case-id hardcoding.

triage_items.evidence_summary: Mapping was used but produced no measurable Top10 gain; vector rank remains far outside Top10 and BM25 has no target hit.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-3 only: evaluate recall-only query mapping/admission for listed ids; no broad mapping expansion.

triage_items.evidence_summary: Query mapping improves best relevant rank only outside Top10; final current Top10 remains a miss.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-3 only: evaluate recall-only query mapping/admission for listed ids; no broad mapping expansion.

triage_items.evidence_summary: Query mapping/rewrite improves rank but merged best rank is still outside Top10; final current Top10 remains a miss.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-3 only: evaluate recall-only query mapping/admission for listed ids; no broad mapping expansion.

triage_items.evidence_summary: Guarded after lowers NDCG versus current before by moving the relevant hit down, although after still beats baseline.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-4 only: analyze guard/effective-score tradeoff for listed ids; do not reopen default feature flag.

triage_items.evidence_summary: Baseline has a Top10 hit, while current before and guarded after both lose the Top10 hit.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-3/M1.3-4 only for listed ids: inspect candidate presence and ranking suppression; no case-id hardcoding.

triage_items.evidence_summary: Relevant target is present only below Top10 after vector repair; final current Top10 remains a miss.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-3/M1.3-4 only for listed ids: inspect candidate presence and ranking suppression; no case-id hardcoding.

triage_items.evidence_summary: Mapping improves rank outside Top10 only; no current Top10 hit is produced.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-3 only: evaluate recall-only query mapping/admission for listed ids; no broad mapping expansion.

triage_items.evidence_summary: BM25 has a near-Top10 relevant candidate but default merged current pool still has no relevant Top10 hit; source marks BM25-hit-but-not-merged gating.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-3 only: inspect controlled BM25/admission merge for listed ids; do not globally expand all candidate pools.

triage_items.evidence_summary: Mapping/rewrite improves best rank but still outside Top10; final current Top10 remains a miss.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-3 only: evaluate recall-only query mapping/admission for listed ids; no broad mapping expansion.

triage_items.evidence_summary: Rerank fusion report records weak-signal boost removal and fallback to baseline order; final current Top10 remains a miss.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-4 only: analyze guard/effective-score tradeoff for listed ids; do not reopen default feature flag.

triage_items.evidence_summary: Current after keeps a Top10 hit but ranks the relevant case below baseline, leaving NDCG lower than baseline.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-3/M1.3-4 only for listed ids: inspect candidate presence and ranking suppression; no case-id hardcoding.

triage_items.evidence_summary: Conservative guard worsens the query versus current before and baseline; precision@5 and NDCG fall while Top10 remains hit.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-4 only: analyze guard/effective-score tradeoff for listed ids; do not reopen default feature flag.

triage_items.evidence_summary: Current after keeps the hit in Top10 but below baseline rank, causing NDCG regression.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-3/M1.3-4 only for listed ids: inspect candidate presence and ranking suppression; no case-id hardcoding.

triage_items.evidence_summary: Typical success sample keeps Top10 hit but loses baseline Top5 coverage; metric regression is precision@5, not recall.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-4 only: protect fixed typical-success ordering/top5 quality for listed ids while preserving bad-case gains.

triage_items.evidence_summary: Typical success sample regresses versus both current before and baseline; relevant ranks move lower while Top10 hit remains true.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-4 only: protect fixed typical-success ordering/top5 quality for listed ids while preserving bad-case gains.

triage_items.evidence_summary: Conservative guard moves relevant hits down versus current before and below baseline NDCG; source marks guard tradeoff.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-4 only: analyze guard/effective-score tradeoff for listed ids; do not reopen default feature flag.

triage_items.evidence_summary: Guard-sensitive ranking improves versus current before but remains below baseline NDCG; relevant cases stay lower than baseline order.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-3/M1.3-4 only for listed ids: inspect candidate presence and ranking suppression; no case-id hardcoding.

triage_items.evidence_summary: Typical success sample keeps precision@5 and Top10 hit but baseline rank quality is not protected; NDCG falls versus baseline.
triage_items.proposed_fix_scope: M1.3-4 only: protect fixed typical-success ordering/top5 quality for listed ids while preserving bad-case gains.

unique_fix_list.allowed_scope: M1.3-3 only: inspect controlled BM25/admission merge for listed ids; do not globally expand all candidate pools.
unique_fix_list.success_check: Listed queries gain target candidate admission without adding new fixed regression.

unique_fix_list.allowed_scope: Evidence-first only: verify qrels/corpus alignment and per-stage target presence before any recall code change.
unique_fix_list.success_check: Evidence either confirms a repairable recall-pool miss or closes the item as qrels/data mismatch; no code change before evidence.

unique_fix_list.allowed_scope: M1.3-3/M1.3-4 only for listed ids: inspect candidate presence and ranking suppression; no case-id hardcoding.
unique_fix_list.success_check: Relevant ranks improve to Top10/closer-to-baseline for listed queries without harming success samples.

unique_fix_list.allowed_scope: M1.3-3 only: evaluate recall-only query mapping/admission for listed ids; no broad mapping expansion.
unique_fix_list.success_check: Mapping/rewrite produces Top10 gain or is explicitly ruled out for the listed queries.

unique_fix_list.allowed_scope: M1.3-4 only: analyze guard/effective-score tradeoff for listed ids; do not reopen default feature flag.
unique_fix_list.success_check: Before-after fixed regression clears for listed guard-sensitive queries without reopening weak-signal overboost.

unique_fix_list.allowed_scope: M1.3-4 only: protect fixed typical-success ordering/top5 quality for listed ids while preserving bad-case gains.
unique_fix_list.success_check: Typical-success Top5/NDCG quality is protected while existing aggregate gains are not erased.

stop_loss_notes: Do not enter M1.3-2 through M1.3-7 from this artifact alone; this turn only freezes and relabels evidence.
product_q002 is evidence-gated: do not implement recall code until qrels/data mismatch versus true recall-pool miss is distinguished.
No evaluation sample, qrels, parameter file, runner, API, retrieval, rerank, guard, frontend, feature flag, database, or data reset was modified.
Later fixes must stay inside unique_fix_list query ids and scopes; no broad default candidate expansion, no case-id hardcoding, and no default ENABLE_WEIGHTED_RERANK enablement.
